arts.ttl: Kane 5th, Mbappé 2nd - Which players have scored the most goals in 2025?
arts.sum: While most European football seasons don’t run parallel to the calendar year, January can often bring with it a clean slate and a renewed perspective on how any given player is going at their...

arts.ttl: Midweek Warm-up: Is Bournemouth’s Dean Huijsen going to be Bayern Munich’s next center-back? We know what it will take to get him; Champions League predictions; Throwing it back to Iron Maiden; and MORE!
arts.sum: That alone indicates that Bayern Munich is likely to invest in another center-back, but how far should the Bavarians go in trying to support Dayot Upamecano and Kim Min-jae? Let’s take a look at what we have on tap for this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show:

arts.ttl: Jeff Stelling annihilates insulting Celtic theory live on air - 'Don't make me laugh!'
arts.sum: Someone claimed Celtic had an 'easy' ride to the knockout stages of the Champions League – but Stelling wasn't having it

arts.ttl: Bayern courting Phil Foden, Spanish media reports
arts.sum: With the Citizens' dismal season continuing, the Manchester club could make wholesale changes in summer with Bayern Munich a potential suitor for one of their prized assets, reports suggest.

arts.ttl: Jeff Stelling hits back at absurd claim about Celtic in the Champions League
arts.sum: Celtic beat the likes of RB Leipzig, Young Boys, Slovan Bratislava and drew with Atalanta, Dinamo Zagreb and Club Brugge to get out of the Champions League groups stage for the first time since 2013. Stelling was sent a text by a listener on talkSPORT claiming that Celtic had an ‘easy’ Champions League group and ‘scraped through’ against Young Boys, even though the Parkhead club had already qualified before facing the Swiss champions.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany doubles down on justification for performance vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Leverkusen played a phenomenal game and forced the Bavarians to suffer. In this one game, the opponent deserved it and we did it,” Kompany explained as captured by @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Celtic told what fans aren't saying about Adam Idah now following Kyogo Furuhashi's exit
arts.sum: Idah started the first leg at Celtic Park and Brendan Rodgers opted to keep him in the side for the win over Dundee United where he scored a belting goal. Brendan Rodgers has a big call to make on Adam Idah ahead of Celtic’s Champions League showdown with Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: 8 next Partick Thistle manager contenders including Celtic legend and Ian Murray
arts.sum: The Jags are searching for a new head coach after Doolan's two year reign in charge was brought to an end

arts.ttl: I'm in Munich for Bayern vs Celtic and I can sense some tension – there are genuine fears about what could transpire
arts.sum: Our man is on the ground and he can sense some grumbling despite the Germans' flying home form

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton states what would happen if Celtic beat Bayern Munich and why fans 'disagree' with him
arts.sum: “If I am honest, if Celtic go there and KO Bayern Munich that would be one of the best results in the club’s history,” said Sutton. Chris Sutton on Celtic possibly creating history against Bayern Munich
